atomic_facts.fact: Re Toh-Shi Printing Singapore was prosecuted in the criminal courts and its directors were imprisoned.
The organisation's directors were personally fined by the court.

inputs.source_text: An enforcement outcome resulted for Toh-Shi Printing Singapore for failing to implement proper and adequate procedural checks while processing personal data for Aviva, resulting in an unauthorised disclosure of personal data of more than 8,000 individuals.
inputs.summary: Re Toh-Shi Printing Singapore was prosecuted in the criminal courts and its directors were imprisoned.

metadata.quality_note: local scaffold only; Azure single-judge labels and kappa are pending

atomic_facts.fact: regulatory action was taken to Asia-Pacific Star, as a data intermediary, for failing to make reasonable security arrangements to prevent the disclosure of the personal data of Tiger Airways Singapore's passengers.

inputs.source_text: regulatory action was taken to Asia-Pacific Star, as a data intermediary, for failing to make reasonable security arrangements to prevent the disclosure of the personal data of Tiger Airways Singapore's passengers.
